name: Super-Easy Roasted Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix one packet of onion soup mix with some oil.
2. Place the potatoes in a roasting pan and coat them thoroughly with the oil and spices.
3. Preheat the oven to 400°F (200°C).
4. Roast the potatoes for 45 minutes, stirring around every 15 minutes until they are golden brown and crispy.
